title: Linear Chain vs Network Structure Comparison
description: Interactive vis-network visualization for linear chain vs network structure comparison
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
vis-network
learningObjectives: Compare a linear chain learning graph with a networked structure using the side-by-side vis-network displays
Explain why a single rigid prerequisite path limits learner flexibility while cross-connections enable multiple learning pathways
Distinguish poor from good learning graph design using the criteria listed in the comparison table
Evaluate an existing learning graph for excessive linearity and recommend cross-connections that would improve it
